items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where 'Extension uninstall revokes all access'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or traces that confirm whether this behavior was tested or validated. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide concrete evidence related to the expected outcome of the scenario, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
